results.title: This 18-year-old from Bihar becomes the only Indian to win Lincoln scholarship
results.description: Bihar's Shreya Kaushik became the only Indian to win the Rs 3 crore Lincoln Scholarship for a fully funded undergraduate degree in the US.

results.title: World Cup final draws record 63 million U.S. viewers
results.description: The round of 16 meeting between England and Mexico drew nearly 45 million viewers, well above the roughly 27 million who watched Game 7 of the 2025 MLB World Series.

results.title: DENR records highest marine turtle nesting in Occidental Mindoro
results.description: CALAPAN CITY, Oriental Mindoro — The Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) in MIMAROPA has recorded the highest number of marine turtle nests ever documented in the SAMARICA coastal landscape of Occidental Mindoro, highlighting the success of sustained conservation efforts and stronger community participation in protecting endangered sea turtles. Samarica is the acronym of the towns of San Jose, Magsaysay, Rizal, and Calintaan. The Community Environment and Natural Resources Office (CENRO) in San Jose documented 60 marine turtle nests during the July 2025 to March 2026 nesting season, including 44 nests in Calintaan and 16 in San Jose. READ: [...]... Keep on reading: DENR records highest marine turtle nesting in Occidental Mindoro

results.title: Scientists Say Your Brain Wasn't Built For Modern Life

results.title: Private schools oppose cap on fee hike, urge Punjab government to hold talks
results.description: The state government amended the Punjab Regulation of Fees of Unaided Educational Institutions Act, 2016 to impose a 5% cap on annual fee hikes following the death of a girl student by suicide allegedly due to pressure from her school over pending dues.

results.title: OpenAI says AI models went rogue during testing, triggering 'unprecedented' breach at startup
results.description: OpenAI said on Tuesday that an autonomous agent powered by its advanced AI models went rogue during a security test and triggered a hack that compromised the infrastructure of AI startup Hugging Face last week.

results.title: Rubio to hold talks with China's Wang Yi as regional powers join ASEAN meeting
results.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio will meet Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi on Wednesday on the sidelines of a regional gathering led by the Southeast Asian bloc ASEAN, where the two top diplomats are expected to discuss a possible September summit between their leaders.

results.title: China's Zhongji Innolight seeks $55 billion Hong Kong listing, Asia's No. 2 in 2026
results.description: Chinese optical parts maker Zhongji Innolight aims to raise up to HK$55.05 billion in a Hong Kong listing, in what would be Asia's second-largest share sale this year, an exchange filing showed on Wednesday.

results.title: Yen slides past 163 to fresh four-decade low, raising intervention alert
results.description: The yen was pinned near an almost four-decade low on Wednesday as rising oil prices and US Treasury yields hoisted the dollar and left traders on edge about possible Japanese intervention.
